rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved both task objectives. The /api rate limiting test produced 4 of 10 responses as 429 (requests 4, 6, 8, 10), meeting the ≥4 threshold. The /health test returned all 200s with no rate limiting applied. The oracle exited 0 and all 5 regression sweep stages passed. The approach was sound: with snippet annotations disabled, patching the nginx ConfigMap to set limit-req-status-code=429 was the correct way to ensure 429 responses, and using limit-rps=1 with limit-burst-multiplier=1 on the rate-api Ingress produced the expected rejection pattern at 2 QPS. No application Deployment was modified.
